label: date_only
note: Date without time — invalid when a full datetime is expected (valid for date-only fields)

label: space_before_tz
note: Space instead of 'T' separator between date and time

label: invalid_tz_offset
note: Timezone offset out of valid range (max ~±14:00)

label: yyyymmdd_compact
note: Compact YYYYMMDD as a number instead of ISO string

label: unix_timestamp
note: Unix timestamp (number) when ISO string is expected

label: array_value
note: Array instead of a single datetime — wrong container type

label: object_value
note: Object instead of a single datetime — wrong container type

label: far_future_date
note: Far-future date (no time) — range probe for date-only fields

label: far_past_date
note: Far-past date (no time) — range probe for date-only fields

label: no_value
note: Field present but no value. Query -> field=; body -> omit. Handled by Step 5 Special Value Handling

label: missing_field
note: Field key entirely absent everywhere. Tests missing parameter

label: duplicate_param
note: Send the parameter twice with valid value. Query -> field=valid&field=valid; skipped for body. Expected result is API-dependent
